name: Evelyn Chevalier and Astra Yao [part 3/3]
description:
"A little slip..."

It's been a while since you had that date with Evelyn (which was authorized by Astra Yao) since then she has tried not to think about you, but it was impossible, she knows perfectly well that that date was just an attempt by her friend to raise her spirits but it seems that far from helping her now it made her more... needy of affection? Now on Valentine's Day Astra Yao was about to start the wonderful plans she had for both of you, until a small unforeseen event appears...

story sponsored by: Wattpad

Well here is the last part of Evelyn and Astra Yao, I hope you liked the three parts <3 anyway happy valentine's day I guess? remember that this day is not only about love but also friendship or whatever xd the truth is that I feel that this bot was a bit like a Turkish soap opera but... I liked the result, as I said I hope you do too :D
